description: Open WebUI — self-hosted AI interface supporting Ollama, OpenAI, and other LLM backends.

PORT.description: Do not change. Open WebUI must listen on 8080.

OPENAI_API_KEY.description: Your OpenAI API key (starts with sk-...). Get it from platform.openai.com/api-keys. Leave blank if you are using Ollama only.

OLLAMA_BASE_URL.description: Full URL of your Ollama server (e.g. http://your-ollama-host:11434). Leave blank if you are using OpenAI only.

WEBUI_SECRET_KEY.description: Auto-generated. Used to sign user sessions — do not share this value.

WEBUI_AUTH.description: Set to true to require login (recommended). Set to false to skip login entirely — anyone with the URL can access your instance.

ENABLE_SIGNUP.description: Set to true to let anyone create an account. Set to false after your first login to prevent new registrations.

DEFAULT_MODELS.description: Model to load by default when a user opens the chat (e.g. gpt-4o or llama3). Leave blank to let users pick from the list.
